title: Anti-war protestors target Prestwick Airport after US planes get green light for Iran strikes

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Anti-war protestors target Prestwick Airport after US planes get green light for Iran strikes. Keir Starmer is allowing the US to use UK bases to launch airstrikes at targets on Iran.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Anti-war protestors target Prestwick Airport after US planes get green light for Iran strikes
